prose:
**Computed Fukui reactivity for acrolein** — DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed coordinates from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz` (8 atoms); this Fukui calculation used Mulliken charges from PySCF DFT single-point calculations on the neutral, cation, and anion states, not a geometry optimization. Density fitting was not requested. Parent state: charge 0/multiplicity 1; cation state: charge +1/multiplicity 2; anion state: charge −1/multiplicity 2. Solvent/environment: gas phase.

**Headline result:** the most electrophilic site is atom **4** (1-based label), **C**, with **f+ = 0.64232102**. The most nucleophilic site is atom **1** (O), with **f− = 0.39388616**.

Per-atom Fukui indices from the tool:

| Atom | Element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.40136419 | 0.39388616 | 0.39762517 | 0.0074780351 |
| 2 | C | 0.022255106 | 0.0059884353 | 0.01412177 | 0.01626667 |
| 3 | C | 0.43404673 | 0.091403097 | 0.26272491 | 0.34264363 |
| 4 | C | 0.64232102 | 0.087369815 | 0.36484542 | 0.5549512 |
| 5 | H | -0.1572595 | 0.085961423 | -0.03564904 | -0.24322092 |
| 6 | H | -0.2072029 | 0.1856796 | -0.010761648 | -0.39288251 |
| 7 | H | -0.062116996 | 0.084485809 | 0.011184406 | -0.14660281 |
| 8 | H | -0.073407645 | 0.065225658 | -0.004090993 | -0.1386333 |

**Warnings:** the tool result did not include a `warnings` array; no warnings were reported there. Integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`, status `ok`. Integrity checks reported by the tool were all OK: `fukui_charge_conservation_f+`, `fukui_charge_conservation_f-`, and `schema_header`.

**Reproducibility:** chemkit returned this CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp3w3ktvli/live.json`. Plot path returned by the tool: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-174210_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. The raw tool result available to me did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot honestly name one.
